introSection: Round About was a steel roller coaster located at Freestyle Music Park in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA. It operated under the name of Maximum RPM! in 2008 and then Round About in 2009. It was the only roller coaster with a ferris wheel lift.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Maximum RPM! opened at Hard Rock Park on April 15, 2008. When the park was rebranded as Freestyle Music Park, the roller coaster was renamed Round About.

Round About closed with Freestyle Music Park in 2009. It was later disassembled and relocated to Sun World Danang Wonders, where it was rebuilt and named Paradise Fall. The ride never opened and was ultimately replaced by Paradise Fall, a roller coaster from Intamin.

fullText:
Round About was a steel roller coaster located at Freestyle Music Park in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA. It operated under the name of Maximum RPM! in 2008 and then Round About in 2009. It was the only roller coaster with a ferris wheel lift.

Maximum RPM! opened at Hard Rock Park on April 15, 2008. When the park was rebranded as Freestyle Music Park, the roller coaster was renamed Round About.

Round About closed with Freestyle Music Park in 2009. It was later disassembled and relocated to Sun World Danang Wonders, where it was rebuilt and named Paradise Fall. The ride never opened and was ultimately replaced by Paradise Fall, a roller coaster from Intamin.
